output.final_deliverable: I cannot build the requested chain because the browsing/visit evidence is missing. The merged results array you supplied is empty ([]), and there are no visit/search results to extract links from. Required missing evidence: 1. Visit result for https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page showing the outbound links found on that page (HTML or extracted link list). 2. Visit results for each subsequent Wikipedia page visited (each page must include the list of links found on that page). 3. For adjacency verification: the specific page HTML or text snippet that demonstrates URL[i] contains a hyperlink pointing to URL[i+1], including the exact href value. What I would produce once those visit results are provided (template of deliverable): - Chain of URLs in order (minimum 4), example format: 1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page 2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Example_Page_1 3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Example_Page_2 4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Example_Page_3 - Explicit adjacency verification (one pair), example format: - Verified adjacency: URL[2] -> URL[3] • URL[2]: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Example_Page_1 • Contains link to: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Example_Page_2 • Evidence excerpt: "Example Page 2" (or full absolute URL) • Source URL for verification: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Example_Page_1 - Extraction notes (if requested): label each fact exactly (e.g., starting URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page; chain length: 4; link href values: exact strings). If you want me to proceed now, please provide (or allow me to fetch) the visit results starting at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page so I can extract links and build the chain and include the required adjacency verification. Currently, because no visit/page evidence was returned, I cannot claim any specific Wikipedia URLs or verify any adjacency links.
output.action_summary: Missing required evidence: the merged results array is empty so I have no visit/search outputs to extract links from. I supplied a template of the deliverable and can proceed once the page visit data is provided.
